examples: Look at 'em dartin' about, an' hearken at 'em callin' to each other.
As he stood still to hearken, a rabbit came running hard towards him through the trees.
Hearken well and spread my tidings.
His sharp tongue and easy sense of humor hearken to the Brooklyn of his youth.
The first is hearken back to better times, remind consumers of who you used to be, and go into the film vaults and pull out classic advertising and edit it for current demands.
